content:
Coordinate worker delegation for this round.
Target agents: POOL-0..POOL-1.
Available shapes: 23 shapes available (23 unprocessed).
Batch target: 2 shapes.

OPTIMIZED SHAPE DISTRIBUTION (batch-size=1, 2 workers, 2 total shapes):
POOL-0: shapes [0..1) - InstallationShape (class: Installation)
POOL-1: shapes [1..2) - EmissionPointShape (class: EmissionPoint)

Delegate immediately using these assignments.
NOTE: a shape's name is the validation rule's name, not necessarily a class name - never assume it is one. Tell each worker to type instances with the class shown in parentheses after each shape above, not with the shape's own name.

First pass: delegate the next batch and keep instructions concise.

Use SHACL context as source of truth for constraints.

Delegate immediately:
- Call `delegate_tasks` for each worker that should run this round.
- Keep each assignment short and concrete.
- Include target shape(s), target class, and whether to CREATE new instances or FIX existing ones.
- Include unresolved focus node/property details when available from Validation Report.
- Require worker tool call: worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).
- In every assignment, restate the exact IRI pattern new instances must use: the ontology's default
  prefix (the one shown as `@prefix : <...>` or `@prefix ontologynamehere: <...>` in the Ontology/SHACL context -
  pick ONE and tell every worker to use that SAME one, not a mix), followed by the exact class local name with a logical and consistent URI. Workers across different rounds/pools must not invent their own casing or
  numbering convention for the same class.
- Remind workers that predicates/classes must come only from the ontology/SHACL context - never
  invented - and that each triplestore_add call is validated as a standalone Turtle document.

Rules:
- Do not produce long analysis text; prioritize immediate tool calls.
- Skip workers with no actionable assignment.
- Always instruct workers to create instances when assigned target class has no instances.
- Keep workers scoped to assigned shapes/classes only.

(+3 more)
- Object properties (1): section
- Datatype properties (0): (none)
- Namespaces: (default)=https://example.org/ns/riepr#, adms=http://www.w3.org/ns/adms#, concept=https://example.org/id/concept/, dbo=http://dbpedia.org/ontology/, dc=http://purl.org/dc/terms/, dct=http://purl.org/dc/terms/, foaf=http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/, hydra=http://www.w3.org/ns/hydra/core#, locn=http://www.w3.org/ns/locn#, nace=http://data.europa.eu/ux2/nace2.1/, ogc=http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#, org=http://www.w3.org/ns/org#, owl=http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#, pplan=http://purl.org/net/p-plan#, prov=http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#, qudt=http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/, rdf=http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#, rdfs=http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#, skos=http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#, sosa=http://www.w3.org/ns/sosa/, ssn=http://www.w3.org/ns/ssn/, ssn-system=http://www.w3.org/ns/ssn/systems/, vann=http://purl.org/vocab/vann/, xsd=http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#

delegate_tasks({"target_agent":"POOL-0","instructions":"TASK: CREATE instances for class :Installation (target shape: InstallationShape).

You must create at least 2 valid :Installation instances that satisfy ALL SHACL constraints.

REQUIRED properties (minCount=1): rdfs:label, dc:issued (xsd:date), adms:status (:actief), dc:modified (xsd:dateTime), dc:created (xsd:dateTime), sosa:isHostedBy (:OperationLocation).

OPTIONAL properties you may include: ssn:hasSubSystem (ssn:System), ssn:implements (:Process), ssn:hasProperty (:InstallationProperty), adms:identifier (adms:Identifier), dc:valid (xsd:date), :section (:Section), ssn:hasDeployment (:Operation), prov:wasRevisionOf (ssn:System), ogc:hasGeometry, dc:type.

IRI PATTERN: Use exactly `@prefix : <https://example.org/ns/riepr#>` as the default prefix. Create instances like `:Installation_1`, `:Installation_2` etc.

IMPORTANT: Each triplestore_add call is validated as a standalone Turtle document — include all necessary @prefix declarations.

SUBMIT: worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues)"})

delegate_tasks({"target_agent":"POOL-1","instructions":"TASK: CREATE instances for class :EmissionPoint (target shape: EmissionPointShape).

You must create at least 2 valid :EmissionPoint instances that satisfy ALL SHACL constraints.

REQUIRED properties (minCount=1): rdfs:label, dc:issued (xsd:date), adms:status (:actief), dc:modified (xsd:dateTime), dc:created (xsd:dateTime), sosa:isHostedBy (:OperationLocation).

OPTIONAL properties you may include: ogc:hasGeometry, ssn:hasDeployment (:Operation), dbo:height, dbo:diameter, dbo:depth, prov:wasRevisionOf (ssn:System), ssn:hasSubSystem (ssn:System), adms:identifier (adms:Identifier), dc:type.

IRI PATTERN: Use exactly `@prefix : <https://example.org/ns/riepr#>` as the default prefix. Create instances like `:EmissionPoint_1`, `:EmissionPoint_2` etc.

IMPORTANT: Each triplestore_add call is validated as a standalone Turtle document — include all necessary @prefix declarations.

SUBMIT: worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues)"})

delegate_tasks({"target_agent":"POOL-0","instructions":"**WORKER POOL-0: Create & Validate Installation Instances**

**Target Shape:** `InstallationShape` (from SHACL context)
**Target Class:** `riepr:Installation`

**TASK:**
1. Read the SHACL Shapes context to understand constraints for `InstallationShape`.
2. Read the Ontology context to identify available predicates and class definitions.
3. Create at least 3 valid `riepr:Installation` instances that satisfy ALL SHACL constraints for `InstallationShape`.
4. Use IRI pattern: `https://example.org/ns/riepr#Installation1`, `riepr#Installation2`, etc.
5. Write ALL triples to the output file using `output_data_writer` (overwrite mode).
6. Validate your output using `shacl_validator` with source="file".
7. Submit worker_progress with: status="COMPLETED", target_shape="InstallationShape", target_class="riepr:Installation", changed_triples_count=<N>, validation_result=<conform/non-conform>, remaining_issues="<none>"

**EXAMPLE STRUCTURE:**
```turtle
@prefix riepr: <https://example.org/ns/riepr#> .
@prefix sh: <http://www.w3.org/ns/shacl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .

riepr:Installation1 a riepr:Installation ;
    riepr:hasName "Installation 1" ;
    # ... add other required predicates from ontology ...
    .
```

**CRITICAL RULES:**
- Only use prefixes/classes/predicates defined in the Ontology context.
- No invented terms, no mixed prefix conventions.
- Must pass SHACL validation for InstallationShape.
- Use `output_data_writer` to write the complete file (not append).","context_name":"Delegation Instructions [POOL-0]"})

delegate_tasks({"target_agent":"POOL-1","instructions":"**WORKER POOL-1: Create & Validate EmissionPoint Instances**

**Target Shape:** `EmissionPointShape` (from SHACL context)
**Target Class:** `riepr:EmissionPoint`

**TASK:**
1. Read the SHACL Shapes context to understand constraints for `EmissionPointShape`.
2. Read the Ontology context to identify available predicates and class definitions.
3. Create at least 3 valid `riepr:EmissionPoint` instances that satisfy ALL SHACL constraints for `EmissionPointShape`.
4. Use IRI pattern: `https://example.org/ns/riepr#EmissionPoint1`, `riepr#EmissionPoint2`, etc.
5. Write ALL triples to the output file using `output_data_writer` (overwrite mode).
6. Validate your output using `shacl_validator` with source="file".
7. Submit worker_progress with: status="COMPLETED", target_shape="EmissionPointShape", target_class="riepr:EmissionPoint", changed_triples_count=<N>, validation_result=<conform/non-conform>, remaining_issues="<none>"

**EXAMPLE STRUCTURE:**
```turtle
@prefix riepr: <https://example.org/ns/riepr#> .
@prefix sh: <http://www.w3.org/ns/shacl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .

riepr:EmissionPoint1 a riepr:EmissionPoint ;
    riepr:hasName "Emission Point 1" ;
    # ... add other required predicates from ontology ...
    .
```

**CRITICAL RULES:**
- Only use prefixes/classes/predicates defined in the Ontology context.
- No invented terms, no mixed prefix conventions.
- Must pass SHACL validation for EmissionPointShape.
- Use `output_data_writer` to write the complete file (not append).","context_name":"Delegation Instructions [POOL-1]"})
